message:
feat(fuzz): add fuzz_pthread_keys (bd-dvr22 + bd-9hq64 tripwire)

## FULL REVIEW MODE verification

Workspace test this turn: only bd-9hq64 still failing (already
filed last turn). No new regressions, no new SIGABRTs, no other
test suites failing. clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D
warnings clean.

## Fuzz gap — bd-dvr22 priority-7 (pthread keys subset)

crates/frankenlibc-fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_pthread_keys.rs covers
the pthread TSD surface (~4 symbols):

  pthread_key_create, pthread_key_delete,
  pthread_setspecific, pthread_getspecific

5 op variants: CreateKey (with/without destructor), DeleteKey,
SetSpecific, GetSpecificRoundTrip, ChildDestructorRun.

Oracles:
- Return-code contract: rc >= 0 on every key-family call.
- Round-trip per-thread storage: setspecific(key, v) →
  getspecific(key) == v byte-for-byte.
- Key isolation: every newly-created key is distinct from every
  live key in the table.
- **bd-9hq64 tripwire**: ChildDestructorRun spawns a child
  thread that calls pthread_setspecific(key, non_null_value)
  and returns. On join, a shared FUZZ_TSD_DESTRUCTOR_HITS atomic
  must have been incremented by our registered destructor. If
  the counter doesn't move, pthread_key destructors are silently
  skipped during thread exit — the exact signature of bd-9hq64.

Safety:
- Per-iteration key allocation capped at MAX_KEYS so we never
  exhaust PTHREAD_KEYS_MAX.
- Child threads always joined synchronously — no dangling handles.
- Destructor payload ownership: Box::into_raw into the child's
  arg, Box::from_raw inside the child to reclaim, so no leak on
  the happy path; pthread_create failure recovers the Box
  explicitly.
- cleanup() nulls per-main-thread specifics before key_delete so
  we never invoke the destructor on a pointer we've already let
  go of.

Single-threaded per iteration via TSDLOCK; true race coverage
deferred to the bd-dvr22 TSan follow-up campaign.

Validation: cargo build clean (0.4s after one unsafe-fn-pointer
fix for `pthread_key_create`'s destructor type); cargo clippy
--no-deps -- -D warnings clean.

bd-dvr22 priority-7 progress: mutex + cond + keys subsets
shipped. Remaining: rwlock, barrier, once + c11threads (TSan).

Agent: cc-libc
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -100,6 +100,11 @@ name = "fuzz_pthread_cond"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_pthread_cond.rs"
 doc = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_pthread_keys"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_pthread_keys.rs"
+doc = false
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_resolver"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_resolver.rs"
